title: Avoid chasing extended crypto moves
description: A valid trend does not justify chasing late entries after extended candles or extreme oscillator readings.

soft.high_vol_caution: ATR ratio > 1.5 thi giam position size 50%
soft.low_cap_caution: SOL/BNB co volatility cao hon BTC 1.5-2x. Tang R:R toi thieu 1:1.5
soft.major_news_avoid: Tranh mo position 30 phut truoc/sau FOMC, CPI, NFP

llm_guidance: Prefer waiting for a retest or returning HOLD when price is stretched.
